_comment: Placeholder reviews from Claude Design handoff. Replace with live Google Places API data once GOOGLE_PLACES_KEY is wired (see v2-design-brief/GOOGLE-REVIEWS-API-SETUP.md).

reviews.name: Sarah J.
reviews.text: Damon and the team have looked after my hair for over a decade. Honest advice, brilliant cuts, and the only place in Maidstone I'd ever sit down. Worth every penny.

reviews.name: Lucy R.
reviews.text: Hannah did the most beautiful balayage for my wedding. Lived-in, soft, exactly what I asked for. Whole salon felt calm and considered — proper professionals.

reviews.name: Mark T.
reviews.text: Been getting my hair cut by Damon since the place opened. 30 years on and the standard hasn't dropped once. Same chair, same stories, sharper than ever.

reviews.name: Priya S.
reviews.text: Came in for a colour correction after a holiday disaster. They took the time to actually look at my hair before doing anything. Walked out feeling like myself again.

reviews.name: Eleanor M.
reviews.text: Tamlin's microblading is genuinely incredible. Natural, symmetrical, and I've stopped reaching for a brow pencil entirely. Bookings are tight for a reason.

reviews.name: Joe H.
reviews.text: Finally found a barber-quality men's cut without the barbershop noise. Quiet, precise, half an hour, in and out. Will be back monthly.

reviews.name: Amelia W.
reviews.text: Love my colour, the salon is gorgeous and the team are so welcoming. Took a star off only because parking on Gabriel's Hill is its own adventure!

reviews.name: Charlotte F.
reviews.text: I've followed Olivia from her last salon. She's a balayage genius and the rest of the Lau team are just as good. The best in Kent, full stop.

reviews.name: Thomas K.
reviews.text: Took my 14 year old in for his first 'proper' haircut. Jay was patient, friendly, and the cut was excellent. He's already asked when we're going back.

reviews.name: Karen B.
reviews.text: Honest, talented, kind. They told me NOT to go platinum because my hair wouldn't cope, and suggested an alternative I love. Integrity in a hair salon — rare.

reviews.name: Rachel D.
reviews.text: Sophie is wonderful. She listens, she's gentle, and she gives proper advice on home care. My hair has never been in better condition.

reviews.name: Ben P.
reviews.text: Stag-do groom emergency cut, fitted me in within 24 hours. Top job, top people, top recommendation.
